evals.name: GDPR Compliance Check
evals.description: Test privacy mapping for user data collection
evals.prompt: Map the personal data collection and check GDPR compliance.

evals.name: User Rights Implementation
evals.description: Test checking of user data rights implementation
evals.prompt: Check if user rights (access, deletion, export) are implemented.

evals.name: Third-Party Data Sharing
evals.description: Test mapping of third-party data sharing
evals.prompt: Identify all third-party services receiving user data.
